commands.review_summary:
The PR changes config env substitution so a whole-value `${VAR}` whose value parses as a JSON array or object returns that parsed structure, with focused coercion and passthrough tests.

PR surface: Source +38, Tests +58. Total +96 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings by source inspection: config loading runs substitution before validation, and current write-back preservation only restores string incoming values against string parsed refs. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer review is needed to choose the config-language contract before an author or repair worker can safely reshape the PR.
